zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：震荡偏多蓄势
zh.content:
当前ADA/USD处于极窄区间震荡格局，价格微幅下跌后迅速回稳，整体维持在0.155附近横盘整理，短线动能偏弱但未破位，市场处低波动盘整阶段，方向等待选择。

技术指标方面，价格持续运行于20日均线0.1542之上，短期结构保持偏多。MACD柱值为正且扩张有限，显示多头动能温和增强，但尚未进入强趋势阶段。

支撑位集中在0.15556低点及0.1542均线附近，下方若失守可能回测0.154区域。上方阻力关注0.1559与0.1562，突破需放量确认。

操作策略建议维持区间交易思路，在支撑附近分批低吸，上方阻力区域逐步止盈。若跌破0.154均线则应及时止损观望，当前不宜追涨。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Cardano is trading around 0.155858, holding slightly above its 20-period simple moving average at 0.1542143. This positioning suggests that buyers retain a modest short-term advantage despite the nearly flat 24-hour performance of -0.10%. The narrow daily range between 0.15556 and 0.155905 reflects limited volatility, indicating that the market is consolidating rather than establishing a decisive directional move. Traders should watch for a breakout beyond this compressed range to confirm stronger momentum.

Although the RSI(14) is unavailable, the positive MACD reading of 0.0017426264 indicates underlying bullish momentum remains present. Without a signal line, however, confirmation of the strength or sustainability of that momentum is limited. The fact that price continues to trade above the SMA(20) reinforces a constructive technical outlook, but the lack of expanding price movement suggests buyers have not yet demonstrated enough conviction to trigger a sustained upward trend.

Immediate support is located near the session low around 0.15556, with secondary support emerging close to the SMA(20) at 0.1542143. A sustained move below these levels could invite additional selling pressure and shift short-term sentiment toward the downside. On the upside, resistance begins near the recent high of 0.155905, and a decisive break above that area could encourage momentum traders to target higher resistance zones established in subsequent trading sessions.

For active traders, patience may be more rewarding than anticipating a breakout before confirmation. A close above resistance accompanied by stronger volume would improve the probability of continued gains, while a breakdown below support would favor a more defensive approach. Risk management remains essential because the current price action reflects consolidation rather than a clear trend. Using disciplined stop-loss levels and avoiding oversized positions can help manage uncertainty until a stronger directional signal develops.
